global_summary: Company is behind at 32.6% of schedule days against a 15.4-point gap, with just 29 of 174 tasks done. Most sites slipped on cashflow, missing photos and unscheduled inspections. Only Holmes is on pace this week; push painting, form boards and rough-ins before Sun Jul 12.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Only the fireplace/door fix landed; painting, gutters, cleaning and final inspection still open. Finish painting and final building inspection by Fri Jul 10 to save the week.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Behind plan; only the secret door build is done, bricks stalled on cashflow. Install bricks by Sat Jul 11 and glass by Tue Jul 14.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: In-ground plumbing and foundation dig done, but form board and city inspections slipped. Place form board by Mon Jul 13; Efrain returns Sunday to schedule it.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: 21.2% of planned work-days earned vs 31.8% expected — behind (3/29 tasks done). Key slip: TILES: INSTALL TILES (Fri Jul 10 → Sat Jul 18, +8d).

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: No tasks closed this week; carpet, tiles and window shutters all pushed out, and the painter botched a texture job. Install window shutters by Fri Jul 17.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: 48.0% of planned work-days earned vs 59.8% expected — behind (6/23 tasks done). Key slip: FRAMING: EXECUTE (Sat Jul 4 → Tue Aug 4, +31d).

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: 20.6% of planned work-days earned vs 25.4% expected — behind (3/25 tasks done). Key slip: ROOFING: INSTALL SHINGLES (Fri Jul 17 → Thu Jul 30, +13d).

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Four items closed including interior paint; cabinet doors, backsplash and glass slipped to Mon Jul 13. Install mechanical trim by Sun Jul 12.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: All three of this week's tasks done—drywall hung and plumbing inspection passed; on pace despite a slight overall lag. Sub starts tape and texture Sat Jul 11.
